calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexander J Perez esq., (415)931-4207 for Plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil DBA Admiral Hotel.
Walter Randell Wolfe, (415)684-4777 Defendant on his own behalf.

The parties return from meeting with the Judge Pro Tem. The matter has not settled.

Plaintiff Kalpeshkumar Gohil and Walter Randell Wolfe are affirmed. Mr. Perez presents an opening statement on behalf of the plaintiff.

Kalpeshkumar Gohil is examined on direct by Mr. Perez, and cross-examination by Walter Wolfe.

Defendant Walter Randell Wolfe presents testimony on his own behalf, and is cross-examined by Mr. Perez.

The Following exhibits are introduced:
Defendant's A: Department of Public Health Complaint
Defendant's B: Complaint Data Sheet

Plaintiff's 1: 3 Day Notice of Lease Termination & Notice to Quit
Plaintiff's 2: 3 Day Notice to Pay of Quit
Plaintiff's 3: 11 page document
Plaintiff's 4: Uniform Hotel Visitor Policy

The Court allows defendant to submit documents from the DBI, and plaintiff to provide plaintiff's overnight guest sign in sheet and the log of overnight guests, with copy to the opposing side, by 11:30 am on Tuesday, July 10, 2018, at which point the matter will be taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
